seo.title: Vanity Hair & Esthetics | Winnipeg Barber Shop
seo.description: Winnipeg's premier barbershop. Precision fades, classic cuts, hot towel shaves. Book your appointment today.

hero.subheadline: Vanity Hair & Esthetics - Winnipeg's premier destination for precision fades, classic cuts, and hot towel shaves. Where craftsmanship meets confidence.

about.subtitle: Our Story
paragraphs: At Vanity Hair & Aesthetics, we believe that a haircut is a ritual. Founded in 2016, we've become Winnipeg's trusted destination for precision barbering services that blend old-school techniques with modern trends.

We specialize in all hair types - from tight fades and tapers to curly cuts and classic styles. Our master barbers take pride in creating looks that are uniquely yours. Whether you need a sharp fade, a hot towel shave, or beard sculpting, you'll leave looking sharper and feeling better.

items.title: The Signature Cut
items.description: Includes consultation, precision cut, and style with premium products.

items.title: Hot Towel Shave
items.description: Straight razor shave with pre-shave oil, hot towels, and post-shave balm.

items.title: Beard Sculpt & Trim
items.description: Detailed shaping, trimming, and conditioning for your beard.

items.title: The Full Service
items.description: Haircut + Beard Trim + Hot Towel treatment. The ultimate relaxer.

items.title: Precision Fade
items.description: Skin fade, taper fade, or any variation. Clean, sharp edges guaranteed.

items.title: Father & Son
items.description: Classic cuts for both. A tradition worth keeping.

items.text: Loved my experience at Vanity Hair & Esthetics! Dereje was fantastic—took time to understand my hair type and gave expert advice on styling. The salon is super clean and friendly. My new cut frames my face perfectly!
items.author: Kibrom Berhe

items.text: Great barber and excellent service! Always professional, friendly, and pays attention to detail. The shop has a clean and welcoming atmosphere, making every visit a great experience. Highly recommend!
items.author: Sunil Sapkota

items.text: Best barber acts like family and treats like family. Haircut was on point and very nice guy. I recommend coming here his prices are really affordable. Thanks so much!
items.author: Gavy Gavy

items.text: The Barber deserves 10 stars! Very friendly and cares for his customers. Attention to details and gives amazing haircuts every time.
items.author: Taohidul Islam Toha

booking.form_subtitle: Walk-ins welcome, but appointments are prioritized.
